notes: Four messages + two photographic artifacts in Day 1. Two system-side errors caught and corrected by Non (Prairie/Paris audio, ๒๕๑๒-vs-๒๔๙๖ visual). Plus one silent dictation correction (Hamasat→Thammasat). Zero confirmed hard-record memory errors. Standing rule established 2026-05-25: trust Non's statements first, verify the system's reading second. Maternal family history adds 4 university institutional anchors (Khon Kaen, Chiang Mai, Thammasat, Mahidol). Single web-searchable open thread: identity of current Thai Minister of Education and home-province corroboration.
